description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage that includes a job named pages. In the pages job, run the exact shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. Configure the job to publish the resulting public directory as an artifact (paths: public) and to deploy it to GitLab Pages. Set the job to run only on the master branch and assign it to the deploy stage, using the default runner image with no additional services.
